title: tournefortia mutabilis
intro: Tournefortia mutabilis, also known as the Mexican clover or "sangre de drago," is a plant species that belongs to the Bignoniaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly its milky sap, which is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tournefortia mutabilis include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Tournefortia mutabilis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
